xanesnet.descriptors package¶

Public API for XANESNET structural descriptors.

class xanesnet.descriptors.Descriptor(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for all XANESNET descriptors.

Parameters:

descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for the concrete descriptor type.

__init__(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Initialize Descriptor.

transform_pmg(pmg_structure, site_index=0)[source]¶

Convert a pymatgen structure to ASE and compute the descriptor.

Parameters:

  • pmg_structure (Structure | Molecule) – Pymatgen Structure or Molecule for the atomic system.

  • site_index (list[int] | int | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor feature array. Shape depends on the concrete descriptor.

abstractmethod transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute the descriptor for one or more sites of an ASE Atoms object.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor feature array. Shape depends on the concrete descriptor.

class xanesnet.descriptors.DIRECT(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Descriptor that reads pre-computed features directly without transformation.

Parameters:

descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

__init__(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Initialize DIRECT.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Raise NotImplementedError because the descriptor is not implemented.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Precomputed descriptor array once implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always, because DIRECT is not implemented yet.

class xanesnet.descriptors.MACE(descriptor_type, invariants_only=False, num_layers=-1)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

MACE foundation-model descriptor.

Uses the MACE-MP-0 universal potential to compute per-atom equivariant features as the structural descriptor.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • invariants_only (bool) – If True, return only rotationally invariant features. Defaults to False.

  • num_layers (int) – Number of MACE message-passing layers to use (-1 for all). Defaults to -1.

__init__(descriptor_type, invariants_only=False, num_layers=-1)[source]¶

Initialize MACE.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute MACE per-atom descriptors for one or more sites.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor array (S, D) where S is the number of selected sites and D is the MACE feature dimension.

class xanesnet.descriptors.RDC(descriptor_type, r_min=0.0, r_max=8.0, dr=0.01, alpha=10.0, use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Radial distribution curve (RDC) descriptor.

Transforms an atomic system into a histogram of pairwise internuclear distances, discretised over an auxiliary real-space grid and smoothed with Gaussians. Pairs are formed between a target site and all atoms within the radial cutoff.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • r_min (float) – Minimum radial grid distance. A. Defaults to 0.0.

  • r_max (float) – Maximum radial cutoff distance. A. Defaults to 8.0.

  • dr (float) – Grid spacing of the auxiliary real-space grid. A. Defaults to 0.01.

  • alpha (float) – Gaussian exponent (smoothing parameter). Defaults to 10.0.

  • use_charge (bool) – Append the charge state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

  • use_spin (bool) – Append the spin state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

__init__(descriptor_type, r_min=0.0, r_max=8.0, dr=0.01, alpha=10.0, use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Initialize the RDC descriptor.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute RDC descriptors for one or more sites.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor array (S, G) where S is the number of selected sites and G is the number of grid points (plus optional spin/charge scalars appended in that order).

class xanesnet.descriptors.WACSF(descriptor_type, r_min=1.0, r_max=6.0, n_g2=16, n_g4=32, l=None, z=None, g2_parameterisation='shifted', g4_parameterisation='centred', use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Weighted atom-centered symmetry function (WACSF) descriptor.

Encodes the local geometry around a site using parameterised radial (G2) and angular (G4) symmetry functions with atom-type weighting.

References

J. Chem. Phys., 2018, 148, 241709 (DOI: 10.1063/1.5019667) J. Chem. Phys., 2011, 134, 074106 (DOI: 10.1063/1.3553717)

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • r_min (float) – Minimum radial distance. A. Defaults to 1.0.

  • r_max (float) – Maximum radial cutoff distance. A. Defaults to 6.0.

  • n_g2 (int) – Number of G2 (radial) symmetry functions. Defaults to 16.

  • n_g4 (int) – Number of G4 (angular) symmetry functions. Defaults to 32.

  • l (list[float] | None) – Lambda values for G4 encoding. Defaults to [1.0, -1.0].

  • z (list[float] | None) – Zeta values for G4 encoding. Defaults to [1.0].

  • g2_parameterisation (str) – G2 grid strategy - 'shifted' or 'centred'. Defaults to 'shifted'.

  • g4_parameterisation (str) – G4 grid strategy - 'shifted' or 'centred'. Defaults to 'centred'.

  • use_charge (bool) – Append charge state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

  • use_spin (bool) – Append spin state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

__init__(descriptor_type, r_min=1.0, r_max=6.0, n_g2=16, n_g4=32, l=None, z=None, g2_parameterisation='shifted', g4_parameterisation='centred', use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Initialize WACSF.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute WACSF descriptors for one or more sites.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor array (S, F) where S is the number of selected sites and F = 1 + n_g2 + n_g4 + use_charge + use_spin.

class xanesnet.descriptors.DescriptorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for descriptor classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a descriptor class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[TypeVar(_T, bound= Descriptor)]], type[TypeVar(_T, bound= Descriptor)]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the descriptor class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Descriptor]

Returns:

Registered descriptor class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no descriptor is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered descriptor names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.descriptors.base module¶

Abstract base class for all XANESNET descriptors.

class xanesnet.descriptors.base.Descriptor(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for all XANESNET descriptors.

Parameters:

descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for the concrete descriptor type.

__init__(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Initialize Descriptor.

transform_pmg(pmg_structure, site_index=0)[source]¶

Convert a pymatgen structure to ASE and compute the descriptor.

Parameters:

  • pmg_structure (Structure | Molecule) – Pymatgen Structure or Molecule for the atomic system.

  • site_index (list[int] | int | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor feature array. Shape depends on the concrete descriptor.

abstractmethod transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute the descriptor for one or more sites of an ASE Atoms object.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor feature array. Shape depends on the concrete descriptor.

xanesnet.descriptors.direct module¶

Pass-through descriptor that uses pre-computed features directly.

class xanesnet.descriptors.direct.DIRECT(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Descriptor that reads pre-computed features directly without transformation.

Parameters:

descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

__init__(descriptor_type)[source]¶

Initialize DIRECT.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Raise NotImplementedError because the descriptor is not implemented.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Precomputed descriptor array once implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always, because DIRECT is not implemented yet.

xanesnet.descriptors.mace module¶

MACE foundation-model descriptor for XANESNET.

class xanesnet.descriptors.mace.MACE(descriptor_type, invariants_only=False, num_layers=-1)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

MACE foundation-model descriptor.

Uses the MACE-MP-0 universal potential to compute per-atom equivariant features as the structural descriptor.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • invariants_only (bool) – If True, return only rotationally invariant features. Defaults to False.

  • num_layers (int) – Number of MACE message-passing layers to use (-1 for all). Defaults to -1.

__init__(descriptor_type, invariants_only=False, num_layers=-1)[source]¶

Initialize MACE.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute MACE per-atom descriptors for one or more sites.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor array (S, D) where S is the number of selected sites and D is the MACE feature dimension.

xanesnet.descriptors.pdos_deprecated module¶

Projected density of states (pDOS) descriptor.

Note

Deprecated - this descriptor is not actively maintained and may produce incorrect results.

class xanesnet.descriptors.pdos_deprecated.PDOS(descriptor_type, code='xtb', method='GFN2-xTB', e_min=20.0, e_max=20.0, sigma=0.7, orb_type='p', quad_orb_type='d', num_points=200, basis='3-21g', init_guess='minao', max_cycles=0, use_charge=False, use_spin=False, use_quad=False, use_occupied=False, accuracy=1.0, guess=0, mixer_damping=0.4, save_integrals=0, temperature=0.00095, verbosity=0)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Projected density of states (pDOS) descriptor.

Transforms a molecular system into a Gaussian-broadened pDOS computed via xTB (tblite) or pySCF, targeting p-channel (and optionally d-channel) contributions on the absorber site.

Note

Deprecated - this descriptor is not actively maintained and may produce incorrect results.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • code (str) – Backend electronic-structure code ('xtb' or 'pyscf'). Defaults to 'xtb'.

  • method (str) – xTB Hamiltonian. Defaults to 'GFN2-xTB'.

  • e_min (float) – Lower energy bound for the pDOS grid. eV. Defaults to 20.0.

  • e_max (float) – Upper energy bound for the pDOS grid. eV. Defaults to 20.0.

  • sigma (float) – Gaussian broadening width (FWHM). eV. Defaults to 0.7.

  • orb_type (str) – AO type string for the primary DOS channel (e.g., 'p'). Used by the pySCF backend; the xTB path uses fixed row selections. Defaults to 'p'.

  • quad_orb_type (str) – AO type string for the quadrupole channel (e.g., 'd'). Used by the pySCF backend; the xTB path uses fixed row selections. Defaults to 'd'.

  • num_points (int) – Number of grid points. Defaults to 200.

  • basis (str) – Basis set for pySCF. Defaults to '3-21g'.

  • init_guess (str) – Initial-guess method for pySCF SCF. Defaults to 'minao'.

  • max_cycles (int) – Maximum SCF iterations. Defaults to 0.

  • use_charge (bool) – Read and apply the charge state from system.info. Defaults to False.

  • use_spin (bool) – Read and apply the spin state from system.info. Defaults to False.

  • use_quad (bool) – Also compute and append d-channel pDOS. Defaults to False.

  • use_occupied (bool) – Project onto occupied MOs instead of unoccupied. Defaults to False.

  • accuracy (float) – Deprecated compatibility argument for the historical xTB path. Accepted but not currently forwarded by this implementation. Defaults to 1.0.

  • guess (int) – Deprecated compatibility argument for the historical xTB path. Accepted but not currently forwarded by this implementation. Defaults to 0.

  • mixer_damping (float) – Deprecated compatibility argument for the historical xTB path. Accepted but not currently forwarded by this implementation. Defaults to 0.4.

  • save_integrals (int) – Deprecated compatibility argument for the historical xTB path. Accepted but not currently forwarded by this implementation. Defaults to 0.

  • temperature (float) – Deprecated compatibility argument for the historical xTB path. Accepted but not currently forwarded by this implementation. Defaults to 9.5e-4.

  • verbosity (int) – Printout verbosity for xTB. Defaults to 0.

__init__(descriptor_type, code='xtb', method='GFN2-xTB', e_min=20.0, e_max=20.0, sigma=0.7, orb_type='p', quad_orb_type='d', num_points=200, basis='3-21g', init_guess='minao', max_cycles=0, use_charge=False, use_spin=False, use_quad=False, use_occupied=False, accuracy=1.0, guess=0, mixer_damping=0.4, save_integrals=0, temperature=0.00095, verbosity=0)[source]¶

Initialize PDOS.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute the pDOS descriptor for a single site.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system. Must contain info['q'] and info['s'] keys when use_charge or use_spin are True.

  • site_index (int | None) – Index of the absorber site. None is not supported. Defaults to 0.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Broadened pDOS array of shape (num_points,) or (2 * num_points,) when use_quad=True. Values are NaN if the calculation fails.

Raises:

  • NotImplementedError – If site_index is None.

  • ImportError – If code='xtb' is requested but tblite is unavailable.

  • ValueError – If an unknown code is specified.

xanesnet.descriptors.pdos_deprecated.atoms_to_pyscf(atoms)[source]¶

Convert an ASE Atoms object to pySCF atom list format.

Parameters:

atoms (Atoms) – The atomic system.

Return type:

list[tuple[str, tuple[float, ...]]]

Returns:

List of (symbol, (x, y, z)) tuples suitable for gto.Mole.atom.

xanesnet.descriptors.pdos_deprecated.spectrum(E, osc, sigma, x)[source]¶

Broaden a stick spectrum into a Gaussian-smeared curve.

Parameters:

  • E (ndarray) – Stick energies (M,). eV.

  • osc (ndarray) – Stick weights (M,) (e.g. pDOS fractions).

  • sigma (float) – Gaussian broadening width. eV.

  • x (ndarray) – Output energy grid (N,). eV.

Return type:

list[float]

Returns:

Broadened spectrum values sampled at each point in x (N,).

xanesnet.descriptors.rdc module¶

Radial distribution curve (RDC) descriptor for XANESNET.

class xanesnet.descriptors.rdc.RDC(descriptor_type, r_min=0.0, r_max=8.0, dr=0.01, alpha=10.0, use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Radial distribution curve (RDC) descriptor.

Transforms an atomic system into a histogram of pairwise internuclear distances, discretised over an auxiliary real-space grid and smoothed with Gaussians. Pairs are formed between a target site and all atoms within the radial cutoff.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • r_min (float) – Minimum radial grid distance. A. Defaults to 0.0.

  • r_max (float) – Maximum radial cutoff distance. A. Defaults to 8.0.

  • dr (float) – Grid spacing of the auxiliary real-space grid. A. Defaults to 0.01.

  • alpha (float) – Gaussian exponent (smoothing parameter). Defaults to 10.0.

  • use_charge (bool) – Append the charge state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

  • use_spin (bool) – Append the spin state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

__init__(descriptor_type, r_min=0.0, r_max=8.0, dr=0.01, alpha=10.0, use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Initialize the RDC descriptor.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute RDC descriptors for one or more sites.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor array (S, G) where S is the number of selected sites and G is the number of grid points (plus optional spin/charge scalars appended in that order).

xanesnet.descriptors.registry module¶

Class-level registry for XANESNET descriptor types.

class xanesnet.descriptors.registry.DescriptorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for descriptor classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a descriptor class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[TypeVar(_T, bound= Descriptor)]], type[TypeVar(_T, bound= Descriptor)]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the descriptor class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Descriptor]

Returns:

Registered descriptor class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no descriptor is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered descriptor names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

xanesnet.descriptors.wacsf module¶

Weighted atom-centered symmetry function (WACSF) descriptor for XANESNET.

class xanesnet.descriptors.wacsf.WACSF(descriptor_type, r_min=1.0, r_max=6.0, n_g2=16, n_g4=32, l=None, z=None, g2_parameterisation='shifted', g4_parameterisation='centred', use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Bases: Descriptor

Weighted atom-centered symmetry function (WACSF) descriptor.

Encodes the local geometry around a site using parameterised radial (G2) and angular (G4) symmetry functions with atom-type weighting.

References

J. Chem. Phys., 2018, 148, 241709 (DOI: 10.1063/1.5019667) J. Chem. Phys., 2011, 134, 074106 (DOI: 10.1063/1.3553717)

Parameters:

  • descriptor_type (str) – Identifier string for this descriptor type.

  • r_min (float) – Minimum radial distance. A. Defaults to 1.0.

  • r_max (float) – Maximum radial cutoff distance. A. Defaults to 6.0.

  • n_g2 (int) – Number of G2 (radial) symmetry functions. Defaults to 16.

  • n_g4 (int) – Number of G4 (angular) symmetry functions. Defaults to 32.

  • l (list[float] | None) – Lambda values for G4 encoding. Defaults to [1.0, -1.0].

  • z (list[float] | None) – Zeta values for G4 encoding. Defaults to [1.0].

  • g2_parameterisation (str) – G2 grid strategy - 'shifted' or 'centred'. Defaults to 'shifted'.

  • g4_parameterisation (str) – G4 grid strategy - 'shifted' or 'centred'. Defaults to 'centred'.

  • use_charge (bool) – Append charge state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

  • use_spin (bool) – Append spin state scalar to the descriptor. Defaults to False.

__init__(descriptor_type, r_min=1.0, r_max=6.0, n_g2=16, n_g4=32, l=None, z=None, g2_parameterisation='shifted', g4_parameterisation='centred', use_charge=False, use_spin=False)[source]¶

Initialize WACSF.

transform(system, site_index=0)[source]¶

Compute WACSF descriptors for one or more sites.

Parameters:

  • system (Atoms) – The atomic system.

  • site_index (int | list[int] | None) – Site index, list of site indices, or None for all sites. Defaults to 0 (the absorber site).

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Descriptor array (S, F) where S is the number of selected sites and F = 1 + n_g2 + n_g4 + use_charge + use_spin.
